hero.title: Sunny CoWork
hero.subtitle: AI Coworking Powered by Codex or Claude
hero.description: Work with VSol and Sunny to turn conversations into working software. Codex or Claude helps generate, test, and document the build while VSol keeps the product practical, secure, and ready to use.

introduction.title: Build With AI, Guided by VSol
introduction.content: Sunny CoWork is VSol's agentic product for designing and building software side by side with AI. Bring a workflow, idea, or messy spreadsheet; we shape it into requirements, prototype it quickly, and guide it toward production.

featuredProducts.title: Sunny CoWork
featuredProducts.description: A guided AI coworking experience for teams that want custom software without a long discovery cycle.
features: VSol oversight from architecture to launch

benefits.title: Move Faster
benefits.description: Go from idea to prototype in days, then keep refining with real feedback.

benefits.title: Stay in Control
benefits.description: AI accelerates the work; VSol guides the architecture, quality, and delivery decisions.

benefits.title: Fit Your Workflow
benefits.description: Build around how your team already works instead of forcing another rigid system into place.

items.title: Custom Internal Tools
items.description: Dashboards, portals, approvals, trackers, and admin tools shaped around your process.

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.description: Replace manual spreadsheets, task lists, and handoffs with focused software.

items.title: AI-Assisted MVPs
items.description: Prototype and validate new software ideas with Codex or Claude, then harden what works.

agentMaster.name: Rommel
agentMaster.title: Sunny CoWork Lead
agentMaster.bio: Rommel leads the Sunny CoWork process, pairing VSol's software experience with Codex or Claude-assisted delivery.
agentMaster.quote: Sunny CoWork is simple: people bring the business context, AI accelerates the build, and VSol keeps the result useful.

cta.title: Try Sunny CoWork
cta.description: Bring us a workflow or product idea. We will help you turn it into working software with Codex or Claude.
